get.description: Return the current user's profile, member, and organization data.

post.description:
Upload a PDF document for processing.

Returns immediately with a job ID. Use GET /upload/status/{job_id} to poll for progress.

get.description:
Get the status of an upload job.

Poll this endpoint to track progress of PDF ingestion.

post.description:
Main RAG endpoint: runs retrieval + generation.

Uses gRPC RAG Service if USE_GRPC_RAG=true, otherwise uses local service.

Cache hierarchy:
1. Semantic cache (similarity >= 0.90) - for similar queries
2. Redis response cache (exact match)
3. Claude API call (slowest)

get.description:
Get highlighted PDF page.

Uses gRPC RAG Service if USE_GRPC_RAG=true, otherwise uses local service.

parameters.name: bboxes

schema.description: JSON string of list of lists: [[x0,y0,x1,y1],...]
schema.title: Bboxes

parameters.description: JSON string of list of lists: [[x0,y0,x1,y1],...]

post.description: Upload a file to GCS and return its path + signed URL.

get.description:
Return a signed download URL for a given document_id.

For now, this looks up the trial_documents table by ID and generates a
signed URL from the stored ``document_url`` (which contains the blob path).

delete.description: Delete a file from GCS by its blob path.

get.description:
Get organization by ID.
Only accessible by admin/superadmin roles.

put.description:
Update organization by ID.
Only accessible by admin/superadmin roles.

patch.description: Partial update for organization (PATCH used by frontend).

delete.description:
Delete a member from the organization.
Only allow if current_user is staff/admin/superadmin.

get.description:
Validate an invitation token for signup (new users).

Returns invitation details if valid.
Raises 404/400 if token is invalid, expired, already used, or does not exist.
